title: cirsium × fissum
intro: Cirsium × fissum, also known as the prickly thistle, is a hybrid plant species derived from the crossing of Cirsium vulgare and Cirsium acaule. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Cirsium × fissum include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. Cirsium × fissum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
